race_meta.race_name: Debenhams Johnny Henderson Grand Annual Challenge Cup Handicap Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked martator at position 9 with only 4.0% probability. Top pick was Be Aware (22.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Be Aware > Jazzy Matty, but actual result was Martator > Jazzy Matty. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Martator had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -1.9%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
